name: Mythallar Bracelet
description:
Three small, crystal beads made from a decommissioned mythallar are strung on this leather bracelet. As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can pluck one bead from the bracelet to gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) checks for 1 minute.
A bead disappears immediately after it's plucked. Once all three beads have been plucked, the bracelet loses its magic.
